/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libdds_security_ac.so -o ../../../../lib/libdds_security_ac.so CMakeFiles/dds_security_ac.dir/src/access_control_objects.c.o CMakeFiles/dds_security_ac.dir/src/access_control_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/dds_security_ac.dir/src/access_control_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/dds_security_ac.dir/src/access_control.c.o CMakeFiles/dds_security_ac.dir/__/__/openssl/src/openssl_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/cyclonedds/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_binding_c/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_posh/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib: ../../../../lib/libddsc.so.0.10.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_binding_c/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_posh/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib
